stemHtml: What is an advantage of a low pressure hydraulic system compared to a high pressure hydraulic system?

options.a: A low pressure system allows for simpler gear type hydraulic pumps.
options.b: Low pressure pumps required less hydraulic fluid.
options.c: A low pressure system is more reliable.
options.d: Low pressure pumps can be used at all altitudes, whereas high pressure pumps are much more efficient at high altitudes.
